name: Funnel Cakes- (Lc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the eggs, milk, and vanilla.
2. Sift together the flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the milk mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Heat oil to 370°F (be sure it is hot; otherwise, the cakes may absorb too much oil).
5. Pour batter from a small pitcher, making loops and crossing over the batter.
6. Fry for about 2 minutes on each side, turning once, until browned well.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Makes about ten cakes.
